_meta.description: Golden Recommended DevSecOps Workstation Profile for Sovereign Node 9010. Any delta against live Discover-SystemState.json must be submitted as DEVSECOPS_DRIFT through the Tau-gated engine for immutable audit sealing.
_meta.source: Professional Research Findings & Confirmed Configuration Guide (30 May 2026) + Sovereign Node 9010 v3.9.1

tau_policy.notes: 90/10 Tau Grace Bow-Out is the explicit policy (user decision). Workstation drift is converted to a normalized Tau extraction ratio. While under 10% some grace exists. At or above 10% the system MUST BOW OUT: automatic Section 177 affidavit (with embedded fact_uuid) + hard pipeline failure. This failure is the saving grace. Fully inside TAU.
